name: idomoo
description: Proxy to the hosted Idomoo Lucas MCP server. Create AI videos end-to-end (brief → blueprint → video) from Claude Desktop.
long_description: Thin Node.js stdio proxy that forwards MCP traffic to Idomoo's hosted Lucas MCP server at https://lucas-mcp.idomoo.ai/mcp. Exposes the 6 official Lucas tools: create_brief, get_brief, create_blueprint, get_blueprint, create_video, get_video.

tools.name: create_brief
tools.description: Create a video brief from a natural-language prompt

tools.name: get_brief
tools.description: Fetch a brief by ID — used to poll status

tools.name: create_blueprint
tools.description: Generate a scene blueprint from a brief

tools.name: get_blueprint
tools.description: Fetch a blueprint by ID — used to poll status

tools.name: create_video
tools.description: Render the final AI video from a blueprint

tools.name: get_video
tools.description: Fetch the AI video — video_url populates when Done

lucas_mcp_key.title: Lucas MCP Key
lucas_mcp_key.description: Your X-Lucas-MCP-Key (get it from https://studio.idomoo.com under API settings).

server_url.title: Lucas MCP Server URL
server_url.description: Override the hosted Lucas MCP endpoint. Leave as default unless instructed.
